Name: Percentage of cases that eventually reach Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of Awaiting Assignment to Batch per case
Metric: Frequency of activity '{}' grouped by the last value of code

Name: Percentage of Awaiting Assignment to Batch activities that are followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of times Awaiting Assignment to Batch occurs after RW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities for cases where activity 'RW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Average performance time (duration) from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of Awaiting Assignment to Batch activities performed in cases with a First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of activities between Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities for cases where activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' occurs

Name: Ratio of Awaiting Assignment to Batch occurrences to First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of cases with Awaiting Assignment to Batch that had a prior SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Average number of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 activities before Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Percentage of Awaiting Assignment to Batch activities in cases that started with Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of distinct activities that can occur between RW-EIC Accept and Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities for cases where activity 'RW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing Awaiting Assignment to Batch that also contain Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Frequency of Awaiting Assignment to Batch relative to the total frequency of all batch-related activities

Name: Ratio of the performance time of the path from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Awaiting Assignment to Batch to the total case duration
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
